話說隨著咱們這樣一問一答，轉眼又來到了周三、而你們週末休息，這樣這問題又要拖過一個禮拜了……

從11月中旬邁向12月中旬……

It's important to maintain good will with your  customers. Bug or not, there are people who roll for gmurphy because of the sacrifice mechanic and   the current changes to the mechanic (that also come 1 week after) does negatively impact the character. 

You have a lot of newbies joining the game now but most of them are gonna drop the game once the anniversary is over. The number of those that remain will be based on their first impression which is already honestly not great due to the poor oversight on the raid implementation that is not good for newcomers with small character and posse pool.

But even if the raid event is flawed other aspects of the game don't have to be bad. You can still win smaller battles like this issue here. The sudden surge and popularity of morimens is from word of mouth of your fans. As long as you keep a majority of your fan base happy, your game community will grow when happy fans recommend the game to others. It's free advertising and marketing.

It's fine to maintain your stance on things regarding game vision like the difficulty, most players can respect and understand that but this issue here is not really about game vision but about being fair. You can nerf, buff or fix mechanic according to your game vision and still compensate those who roll for gmurphy before the fix. 

Mind you I have oe gmurphy and I intend to keep her reset or no. So I don't have much stakes in this but if this is how nerfs or bug fixes are handled in game, I will naturally be much more cautious in spending.
Is auritas Skill info missing some information? Most clearly state that it's wod's and such items equipped on the character
Thank you for providing the information. I have forwarded it to QA❤️

Once I left the Rewind screen on Celeste, it disappeared from there, and I began searching, finding it on Nautila for some reason (who I don't have any intention of Rewinding).

Could I get the Rewind removed from Nautila and get it on Celeste, or anything similar?

content:
<@235208969352642561>There are several pieces of information that you need to provide:
1. Your UID
2. It is best to provide a bug screen recording (if it cannot be achieved, it can also be omitted)
3. In which levels of battles did you encounter the problem of getting stuck
4. Specifically, which characters' Exalt will get stuck when released (you can share screenshots of your team)
5. Audio bug: Is there a problem with BGM? Or is there a problem with the sound effect? At which battle level did you encounter it specifically?

We need to confirm these issues based on them. Thank you for your help

一年多以来到诞墨出之前几乎没有闪退的情况，诞墨更新之后当天上线试用关卡闪退四五次，之后就是带诞墨帧率立刻降低，以及她开狂气爆发有约五分之一的时候会闪退，其他队伍也有小概率会闪退。前几天开周年活动后这个问题更严重了，打开活动界面、打开活动关卡，开大，打到一半都有概率闪退，甚至闪退回来之后已经打出的卡牌还在手牌上显示，甚至是最高图层，挡住部分别的手牌。今天我试图上线试了五六次，只要点开活动主页一定闪退。这个问题影响真的很严重，且不止我一个玩家有这个问题。至少我的设备我确认过没有内存和网络问题

Make an early Phase in Mission Report dedicated to forcing players to utilize realm mechanics. New players coming into the game very often don't learn about realm mechanics like Crimson Furnace or Tentacle stance switching until very later on, like chapter 8 of arc 1. This would incentivize players to look into the realms and actually learn about it instead of going through the entirety of arc 2 without realizing that red stance causes tentacles to attack with every damage instance. The quests could be:

1. Use Crimson Furnace to heal X HP
2. Switch tentacle stances to Tranquil Sea and Raging Waves
3. Use Raging Waves stance to trigger X tentacle attacks before the end of the turn
4. Use Annihilation to take X cards out of Ultra Space

content: Thank you for your feedback. We have watched the video and it is possible that the playback effect still needs improvement in some levels. We are currently discussing further adjustments🙏
✅「Answered」Auto-scroll fixes not in effect

Playback? You mean the story scrolling?
Plus, what about the things written in the old patch notes? Were those not accurate or just not pertinent to story text altogether?
I don't understand if that is a bug or the changes where not there in the first place

If we hadn't done it, we wouldn't have included it in the announcement
Now it seems that the implementation effect is not perfect enough, and the relevant personnel in charge have stated that they will find ways to optimize the effect
The fix they made wasn't effective, I've also seen some instances where it works and some where it doesn't.
There is an instance where the text don't scroll if you don't click?

"Scrolling is now controlled manually and will not automatically happen (unless autoplay is turned on)." 
Like, if this worked, that would solve the problem
It'll pause for awhile then scroll, while sometimes it instantly scrolls, hence it wasn't effectively implemented
ok, but that line about it being manual, is just wrong then
From my experience, yeah
that is what i don't understand
Unless they only tested it in the first chapter and it just doesn't work everywhere else lmao
that may very well be the case, if the automatic pause is also absent in some parts
and that is what i wanted to covey to Goya, that is a fundamentally missing feature
is not that they have to add something else, is just missing
Tldr , smaller text and short pause before scrolling exists, but manual scroll  does not
ya

content: 一年多以来到诞墨出之前几乎没有闪退的情况，诞墨更新之后当天上线试用关卡闪退四五次，之后就是带诞墨帧率立刻降低，以及她开狂气爆发有约五分之一的时候会闪退，其他队伍也有小概率会闪退。前几天开周年活动后这个问题更严重了，打开活动界面、打开活动关卡，开大，打到一半都有概率闪退，甚至闪退回来之后已经打出的卡牌还在手牌上显示，甚至是最高图层，挡住部分别的手牌。今天我试图上线试了五六次，只要点开活动主页一定闪退。这个问题影响真的很严重，且不止我一个玩家有这个问题。至少我的设备我确认过没有内存和网络问题
